//: Tooling tsconfig — type-checks workspace tooling files (Vitest, Playwright, Astro, Drizzle, app/build configs) and the web e2e step library. Consumed only by ESLint via the overlay in eslint.config.mjs so typescript-eslint's projectService can locate these files; production builds and per-workspace `pnpm typecheck` runs do NOT consume this tsconfig. Lives at the repo root so a single overlay covers every workspace.
